description: A designed ICE 'rogues-gallery' card in the agency's standard 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' template, but here the background is the subject's own photograph rather than the generic handcuffs image. The full-bleed background is a grainy black-and-white photo of a man with a shaved/short-haired head and a goatee, shown from the chest up in front of what appears to be an indoor setting with a plant; the image quality is low-resolution and surveillance-like. A dark overlay covers the upper band and left column. The headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' is in bold pale-cyan serif capitals, with white subhead '1/26/2025 | St. Paul, MN'. The subject's name 'Octavio Juarez Bonilla' is in large bold white sans-serif, followed by 'CRIME:' and a bullet 'Possession of child pornography.' The white DHS/ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark are in the lower-left; a diagonal red banner in the lower-right reads 'ST. PAUL'. The card foregrounds an especially serious alleged offense, a technique meant to maximize public revulsion and justify the deportation campaign by emphasizing the most heinous charges. Target audience: general public and administration supporters.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/26/2025 | St. Paul, MN; Octavio Juarez Bonilla; CRIME: Possession of child pornography; ICE; ST. PAUL
